tasks.title: Loop-based orchestration patterns
tasks.description: Research deterministic loop patterns (ReAct, orbit loop, AutoGPT-style). Document how each handles state, checkpoints, and termination.
tasks.synthesis_goal: Comparison table of loop-based approaches with pros/cons

tasks.title: Graph-based orchestration
tasks.description: Investigate DAG and state-machine approaches (LangGraph, Prefect, Temporal). Focus on how they handle branching, parallelism, and error recovery.
tasks.synthesis_goal: Architecture diagram and trade-off analysis vs loop-based
